name: Attunementless
title: Master of None
description: A warrior who channels Ether directly through their body instead of through an element.

traits.name: Purity of the Song
traits.description: Gain 20 attribute points to distribute freely.

traits.name: Ether Surge
traits.description: Temporarily double a chosen attribute modifier at the cost of damage over time.

traits.name: Ethereal Combo
traits.description: Spend Ether to make additional weapon attacks.

name: Frostdrawer
title: Master of Frost
description: A controller who manipulates ice and freezing Ether.

traits.name: Freezing Veins
traits.description: Create a Hemafrost artifact that channels frost power.

traits.name: Cold Front
traits.description: Emit freezing bursts when hit.

traits.name: Cryostasis
traits.description: Encase yourself in ice to negate damage.

name: Galebreather
title: Master of Wind
description: A fast and elusive fighter who controls wind and movement.

traits.name: Legion Mind
traits.description: Harness wind through a Gale Kata artifact.

traits.name: Aerogliding
traits.description: Control air while falling.

traits.name: Cyclone Blade
traits.description: Turn melee attacks into ranged wind strikes.

name: Thundercaller
title: Master of Storms
description: A high-damage class that channels lightning and unstable energy.

traits.name: Electric Essence
traits.description: Use a lightning-based artifact to channel storms.

traits.name: Static Fakeout
traits.description: Teleport lightning strikes to attackers.

traits.name: Overcharge
traits.description: Convert movement into damage power.

name: Ironsinger
title: Master of Metal
description: A heavy fighter who manipulates metal and reinforces their body.

traits.name: Forged in Iron
traits.description: Create a Ferrofluid artifact to control metal.

traits.name: Metal Absorption
traits.description: Reduce enemy AC and empower allies.

traits.name: Polished Armor
traits.description: Deal damage to enemies when hit.

name: Bloodrend
title: Master of Blood
description: A life-and-death manipulator who uses blood as a weapon.

traits.name: Blood Bending
traits.description: Control blood through a Tourniquet artifact.

traits.name: Sheltering Grasp
traits.description: Drain or heal using blood.

traits.name: Crimson Fountain
traits.description: Explode enemies into damaging blood waves.

name: Shadowcast
title: Master of Darkness
description: A stealthy caster who manipulates shadows and fear.

traits.name: Shadow Master
traits.description: Use a Pure Heart artifact to control shadows.

traits.name: Shadow Travel
traits.description: Teleport through shadows.

traits.name: Black Hole
traits.description: Create a domain that drains Ether.

name: Flamecharmer
title: Master of Flame
description: A destructive caster who manipulates fire and heat.

traits.name: Whispering Flames
traits.description: Use a Hearthgem artifact to control fire.

traits.name: Flame Within
traits.description: Empower yourself with burning energy.

traits.name: Corpse Explosion
traits.description: Explode burning enemies on death.

traits.name: N/A
traits.description: N/A

traits.name: N/A
traits.description: N/A
